parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in a physical set with practical lighting. The AI tutor is a digital element displayed on a physical tablet within the scene.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion. Long straight blonde hair with dark roots. Dark lipstick and eyeliner.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant but engaged, focused on her coloring.

characters.appearance: Voice only, represented by a 3D animated female avatar with red hair visible on a tablet screen.

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room with purple and pink ambient lighting. A desk with a coloring book, markers, and a tablet. A white and pink gaming chair is in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated at a desk, actively coloring in a large coloring book using a yellow highlighter. She holds the marker in her right hand and rests her left hand on the book. To her right, a tablet is propped up, displaying an animated avatar. The room is bathed in vibrant purple and pink lighting. Behind her, the top of a white and pink gaming chair is visible, along with a closed white door and some wall decorations. Character A looks down at her coloring, occasionally pausing to think or react to the conversation, looking slightly off-camera or towards the tablet.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous shot of Character A coloring while having a conversation. Text overlays appear dynamically, displaying the dialogue. A banner of Spanish flags hangs at the top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Can you speak Spanish?
Character A says: Uuuh... un poco [a little]
Character B says: Okay, what Spanish words do you know?
Character A says: Hola. [Hello.]
Character B says: Nice! What else?
Character A says: Gracias. [Thank you.]
Character B says: Good. And what do you say when you make a mistake?
Character A says: I... sorry?
Character B says: Almost. Repeat after me: "Lo siento." [I'm sorry.]
Character A says: Lo siento. [I'm sorry.]
Character B says: Your level is A1, but that's totally fine.
Character A says: I don't really speak Spanish... I just watch series with subtitles.
Character B says: That's enough to start! You can practice with AI tutors like me.
Character A says: Like you?
Character B says: Yes! Praktika has AI Spanish tutors who correct you and talk to you naturally. You'll start speaking Spanish much faster.
Character A says: But... with an AI?
Character B says: You won't lose anything by trying, and it will be worth it.
Character A says: Okay... teach me Spanish.
Character B says: I will! But don't start giving orders to your new teacher.
Character A says: Lo siento... [I'm sorry...]
Character B says: Go download Praktika right now.
Character A says: Okay, okay, I'm going!

scenes.visual_description: A static end card with a white background displaying the app logo and download buttons.
